nodes.name: Send Slack Notification
Daily Trigger

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    oc.id AS "Claim ID",
    se.first_name AS "Claimaint Name",
    sc.name AS "Claimaint Corporate",
    oc.created_at AS "Claim Created Date",
    oc.modified_at AS "Claim Modified Date",
    ocs.name AS "Claim Stage",
    oc.claim_type AS "Claim Type",
    oc.claim_for AS "Who's Claim for",
    oc.symptoms AS "Claim Details",
    ABS(DATEDIFF(oc.modified_at, NOW())) AS "Difference B/W Last modified till Now"
FROM opd_claim oc
JOIN opd_claimstage ocs ON oc.stage_id = ocs.id
JOIN opd_employee oe ON oe.id = oc.employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_employee se ON se.id = oe.opd_sb_employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate sc on sc.id = se.corporate_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate_product_plan scpp ON scpp.plan_id = oc.pool_id
WHERE 
	scpp.product_id = 1
	AND scpp.policy_end > now()
    AND ocs.id = 1
    AND oc.checker_user_id is not null
    AND oc.modified_user_id = oc.checker_user_id
    AND se.corporate_id <> 34
    AND oc.modified_at > oc.created_at
    AND oc.modified_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY oc.created_at ASC;

nodes.name: OPD claims created and assigned but not update within 7 days

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    oc.id AS "Claim ID",
    se.first_name AS "Claimaint Name",
    sc.name AS "Claimaint Corporate",
    oc.created_at AS "Claim Created Date",
    oc.modified_at AS "Claim Modified Date",
    ocs.name AS "Claim Stage",
    oc.claim_type AS "Claim Type",
    oc.claim_for AS "Who's Claim for",
    oc.symptoms AS "Claim Details",
    ABS(DATEDIFF(oc.modified_at, NOW())) AS "Difference B/W Last modified till Now"
FROM opd_claim oc
JOIN opd_claimstage ocs ON oc.stage_id = ocs.id
JOIN opd_employee oe ON oe.id = oc.employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_employee se ON se.id = oe.opd_sb_employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate sc on sc.id = se.corporate_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate_product_plan scpp ON scpp.plan_id = oc.pool_id
WHERE 
	scpp.product_id = 1
	AND scpp.policy_end > now()
    AND ocs.id = 1
    AND oc.modified_user_id = oc.created_user_id
    AND oc.checker_user_id is null
    AND se.corporate_id <> 34
    AND oc.created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
    AND oc.modified_at > oc.created_at
    AND oc.modified_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY oc.created_at ASC;

nodes.name: OPD claims created and not assigned and not update within 7 days

parameters.query:
-- Claims Stage is "Document uploaded" and not updated more then 7 days
SELECT 
    oc.id AS "Claim ID",
    se.first_name AS "Claimaint Name",
    sc.name AS "Claimaint Corporate",
    oc.created_at AS "Claim Created Date",
    oc.modified_at AS "Claim Modified Date",
    ocs.name AS "Claim Stage",
    oc.claim_type AS "Claim Type",
    oc.claim_for AS "Who's for Claim",
    oc.symptoms AS "Claim Details",
    ABS(DATEDIFF(oc.modified_at, NOW())) AS "Difference B/W Last modified till Now"
FROM opd_claim oc
JOIN opd_claimstage ocs ON oc.stage_id = ocs.id
JOIN opd_employee oe ON oe.id = oc.employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_employee se ON se.id = oe.opd_sb_employee_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate sc on sc.id = se.corporate_id
JOIN smartbenefits_corporate_product_plan scpp ON scpp.plan_id = oc.pool_id
WHERE 
	scpp.product_id = 1
	AND scpp.policy_end > now()
    AND ocs.id = 18
    AND se.corporate_id <> 34
    AND oc.modified_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY oc.created_at ASC;
